original_question:
There are 10 lily pads arranged in a pond as shown in the diagram. A frog can jump from one lily pad to an adjacent lily pad. If the frog plans to start jumping from one of the lily pads and make 4 jumps total, how many different ways can it jump?

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
